category.scope_note: Filtering respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB / GB/T / NMPA) to Peru market requirements managed through INACAL NTP and sector regulators.

title.en: China-to-Peru PPE Respirator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China-to-Peru respiratory protective products against INACAL NTP references (and adopted IEC routes), MTPE occupational-safety requirements, DIGEMID routes for medical-mask use, PRODUCE/INDECOPI technical-regulation workflow, MINEM energy-labeling where relevant, MTC telecom checks for radio features, and Callao-port importer practices.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国口罩呼吸器对比秘鲁要求：INACAL 采纳的 NTP 及 IEC 路线、MTPE 职业安全要求、面向医用口罩路径的 DIGEMID 要求、PRODUCE/INDECOPI 技术规章流程、MINEM 能效标识（相关范围）、含射频功能的 MTC 检验，以及卡拉奥（Callao）口岸的进口商实践。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國口罩呼吸器對比秘魯要求：INACAL 採納的 NTP 及 IEC 路線、MTPE 職業安全要求、面向醫用口罩路徑的 DIGEMID 要求、PRODUCE/INDECOPI 技術規章流程、MINEM 能效標示（相關範圍）、含射頻功能的 MTC 檢驗，以及卡拉奧（Callao）港口的進口商實務。

disclaimer.en: For informational comparison only. This is not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access authorization. Exporters should verify each active norm, labour-safety rule, and import workflow directly with local legal and regulatory advisors before shipment to Peru.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供信息性对比，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入许可。出口商应在秘鲁出货前，基于本地法律咨询确认各项现行法规、职业安全规则与进口流程。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供資訊性對照，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入許可。出口商應在秘魯出貨前，基於本地法規顧問確認各項現行法規、職業安全規則與進口流程。

answer_first.en: For respirators sold for worker protection in Peru, importers and manufacturers should align to INACAL-adopted technical references and MTPE occupational use expectations, with conformity handled through the Peru importer workflow rather than China-only certificates. Chinese GB 2626 / NTP / CCC evidence does not automatically transfer. Medical-style masks follow the DIGEMID pathway, and only products with telecom/radio modules face MTC homologation. As in this lane, Peru has no EU-style mandatory horizontal RoHS, battery-regulation, or outdoor-noise regime that replaces this respirator-specific route.
answer_first.zh: 在秘鲁面向职业防护销售的呼吸器中，进口商和制造商应以 INACAL 采纳标准和 MTPE 职业用途要求为准，合规以秘鲁进口流程为核心，而非沿用中国本地证书。中国 GB 2626 / NTP / CCC 证据不能直接转移。医用化口罩需按 DIGEMID 路径处理，只有具备通讯/无线功能的型号才触发 MTC 型号核准。本通道中，秘鲁没有可替代该职业呼吸器路线的欧盟式横向 RoHS、电池法规或户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 在秘魯面向職業防護銷售的呼吸器中，進口商和製造商應以 INACAL 採納標準及 MTPE 職業用途要求為準，合規以秘魯進口流程為核心，而非沿用中國本地證書。中國 GB 2626 / NTP / CCC 證據不能直接轉移。醫用化口罩需按 DIGEMID 路徑處理，只有具有通訊/無線功能的型號才會觸發 MTC 型號核准。本通道中，秘魯沒有可替代該職業呼吸器路線的歐盟式橫向 RoHS、電池法規或戶外噪音制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Prefer official sources from INACAL, MTPE, PRODUCE/INDECOPI, MINEM, MTC, and DIGEMID.
